title: How to get better FPS for free at the expense of Visual Quality?

messages.content: # Getting low FPS and will do anything for a boost? Follow this guide!

## Method 1
> Open Content Manager and go to Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > Graphics Adjustments
> Enable **AMD FSR (FidelityFX Super Resolution)**
> Set the Quality as you wish:
> Performance will look the worst, but give you more FPS. Custom Quality will look the best, but without a big improvement in FPS.
